ocr_findings.description: OCR line 4 reads 'カレーメン、メル、メルダン' — this is a garbled OCR of the ruby annotation 'めいよきそんざい' (名誉毀損罪) that appears above '名誉毀損罪' in the image. The ruby text was misread as nonsense katakana/kanji, changing the appearance of the term.

reviewer_notes: Page is an answer-explanation section for exam questions 2-9 through 2-14, with labeled answer letters (ウ/エ/エ/イ/エ/ウ) and per-choice explanations (ア/イ/ウ/エ). This fits the 'exam' label as it is part of the exam question-and-answer block. One med-severity ruby-text OCR garble at '名誉毀損罪'. All answer letters and explanation prose otherwise faithfully transcribed.
